20Minuten.instruction: Provide a simplified version of the following paragraph in German.
20Minuten.suffix: Directly output the simplified paragraph as your answer.

C-STANCE.instruction: 判断以下文本对指定对象的态度，选择一项：A.支持，B.反对，C.中立。输出A，B或者C。
C-STANCE.suffix: 直接只回答A 或者 B 或者 C作为你的答案。

FOMC.instruction: What is the monetary policy stance for the following text? A. dovish, B. hawkish, C. neutral. Choose one from A, B and C.
FOMC.suffix: Directly output only A or B or C as your answer.

MeetingBank.instruction: Write a summary of the following meeting transcripts.
MeetingBank.suffix: Directly output only the summary as your answer.

NumGLUE-cm.suffix: Directly output only the numerical value as you answer.

NumGLUE-ds.suffix: Directly output only the numerical value as you answer.

ScienceQA.instruction: Choose an answer for the following question and give your reasons.
ScienceQA.suffix: Directly output only A or B or C or D as your answer.
